name: Persimmon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar together.
2. Add the persimmon pulp and beaten eggs to the mixture.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) and add them to the liquid mixture.
4. Beat well until all ingredients are incorporated.
5. Pour the batter into a greased pan.
6. Bake in a moderate oven (325°F to 350°F) for about an hour.
